title: My Prediction for 30 10
wikitext:
[]: My Prediction for 3.0 + 1.0             Quote Post by ZetaSonic » Sun Sep 04, 2016 10:44 pm Like with the end-of-movie trailer for 3.33, nothing we saw will happen. Instead, we will get a feature-length equivalent of televised Episodes 25 and 26, where the characters sit and talk on a soundstage and nothing happens. Then we get a random sit-com to kick off the climax and the whole cast tells Shinji "Congratulations"!.

[]: Re: My Prediction for 3.0 + 1.0             Quote Post by BC Baron » Mon Sep 05, 2016 8:55 pm ^ I would still consider that a major improvement over the raging dumpster fire Q turned out to be.

[]: Re: My Prediction for 3.0 + 1.0             Quote Post by dontaskme » Tue Sep 06, 2016 12:16 am congratulations

[]: Re: My Prediction for 3.0 + 1.0             Quote Post by rarzilla » Thu Sep 08, 2016 6:04 am BC Baron wrote: ^ I would still consider that a major improvement over the raging dumpster fire Q turned out to be.
